examples: I felt loath to sully the gleaming brass knocker by handling it.
Let us sully the air for the oppressor.
Sully peered into the blood-splattered cockpit.
Sully also travels often with his wife, Lorrie, and two daughters, aged 19 and 17.
The German carmakers' costs are too high and their brands too valuable to sully with low-budget overtones.
